rows.notes: Selected description from gemini-flash, confirmed '1842' by visual verification. gpt-5-mini misread year as '1872'.
Consensus across all extractors for description, row_type, and blank amounts, confirmed by visual.

rows.english_description: Fees collected by the Dean (Dean's fees).

rows.notes: Overrode both extractors after close visual inspection. The actual amount for this row is £30 14s 1d. gemini-flash was significantly off (2, 2, 7). gpt-5-mini misread pounds as '130' by including digits from a subsequent line.
rows.english_description: First payment made by the Bursar into the fee fund.
rows.english_description_with_amount: First payment by the Bursar to the fee fund, amounting to £30 14s 1d.

rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini's values, confirmed visually. Pounds '88', shillings '11'. Pence is a very faint '1', gpt-5-mini's interpretation is plausible while gemini-flash assumed it was blank. gemini-flash's pounds (30) and shillings (14) were for the previous line.
rows.english_description: Second payment made by the Bursar into the fee fund.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Second payment by the Bursar to the fee fund, amounting to £88 11s 1d.

rows.notes: Overrode both extractors after close visual inspection. Pounds is '13', shillings '17'. Pence column appears blank. gpt-5-mini's '113' for pounds seems to incorrectly merge digits, and its '7' for pence is not clearly visible. gemini-flash's values (88, 11) were for the preceding line.
rows.english_description: Third payment made by the Bursar into the fee fund.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Third payment by the Bursar to the fee fund, amounting to £13 17s 0d.

rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini's values, confirmed visually. gemini-flash had incorrectly extracted the values from the preceding '3d Do' entry for this line (£13 17s).
